query_normalized: llmxive follow-up: extending "multabench: benchmarking multimodal tabular learning with text and ima" computer science
rationale: This paper satisfies criteria (b) and (f) as it provides a canonical survey on self-supervised learning for tabular data, which is a core component of the "Multimodal Tabular Learning" domain mentioned in the user's question (specifically the tabular modality). It establishes the empirical baseline and methodological landscape for tabular representation learning, which is essential context for any follow-up work extending benchmarks in this specific area.
